AR day 05
Crochet Book Pulled From Shelves!
Dear {!firstname_fix},
Whether you've just joined our
mailing list, or you've been with
us for quite some time, Thank You!
My staff and I really appreciate
every single warm & gracious email
we receive!
I don't usually send messages out on
a weekend, but I promised I'd send
more information about what is going on.
And, a promise is a promise.
So, what have I been up to, you ask?
Well... For the past few months, my
dear friend and colleague, Jack
Arts, and I have been working
very hard on the update for my
'Crochet for Today!' ebook.
But, instead of updating, I've decided
to take it off the market very soon...
Why?
After receiving literally thousands of
emails requesting answers to your
most challenging crochet and
crochet design questions, Jack and
I realized a simple update wasn't
going to be enough.
Not nearly enough!
We need a whole new, different book!
In fact, we need two of them!
So, we're putting additional tips,
tricks and answers to all your
questions into a brand new,
2-Volume set!
Vol. 1 - Beginning & Intermediate
Vol. 2 - Intermediate & Advanced
(The official titles of the individual
volumes will be decided soon.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 63 --

Ideas welcome!)
It's been a LOT of hard work. (A lot
more than either of us anticipated.)
But, I feel I've really been blessed
to be a part of such an incredible
community of people, and I thank
you from the bottom of my heart.
So, I'd like to share something with
you...
Until the new 2-volume set launches,
all new customers that purchase my
original 'Crochet for Today!'
ebook package will get their choice of
one of the new volumes absolutely FREE!
(And, if you'd like the full set, you'll get
a huge discount on the other volume!)
This goes for all past customers as well!
Once the new 2-volume set is available,
the first edition of Crochet for Today!
will be pulled from the 'shelves' forever.
So, if you've been thinking about picking up
a copy of 'Crochet for Today!', and
all the terrific bonuses that come with it, there
will never be a better time than right now!
More details soon, my friends...
Happy Crocheting!
Judy

AR day 87
New Crochet Video Books FAQ's!
Hi <$firstname$>,
WOW!
We've received some terrific blog posts and an AVALANCHE
of emails since the '7 Biggest Mistakes Crocheters Make...'
report was released last Friday, including some outstanding
questions (and requests) about the upcoming Video Books.
So... here are some answers!
Q. 'What do I need to watch 'em?'
A. Since Adobe Acrobat and Macromedia Flash Player comes
pre-installed on 98% of the computers out today, there is an
excellent chance you already have what you need to open
the Video Books and watch the movies.
So, if you've been able to see the sample videos so
far, you'll be able to read the books and watch the
videos. If you've had trouble, here's what you need:
1) Adobe Acrobat
You'll need Adobe Acrobat Reader 5.5 (or later)
to open, read, and print the Video Books. If you're
unsure which version you have, or you'd like to have
the latest version, click here (it's frŽe):
http://www.adobe.com/products/acrobat/readstep2.html
2) Macromedia Flash Player
To get the most current version, click here (it's frŽe):
http://tinyurl.com/3tuy
3) Patience! (if you're on a dial-up connection)
Depending on your computer system and connection
speed, you may need to wait till the video is fully
loaded before you can view it without stopping.
(This may take a few minutes if you're on dial-up.)
Q. 'The videos are awesome! I was just wondering how
much they would be, and if you are going to sell any
more of Judy's original ebooks?
A. As far as Judy's original ebooks, they are indeed
sold out and will not be available again.
But the great news is, the new Video Books give even more
detail than the original ebook!
The price for the instantly downloadable Video Books will
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 63 --

be $47.77 per volume. (NOTE: There will be a limited-time
offer of only $37.77 per volume. Check the website Thursday
morning!)
And, if you order both at the same time, the discounted
price is only $57.77 for BOTH Video Books!
Q. 'I remember something about a free book. Where and how
do I get it?'
A. If you purchased Judy's original 'Crochet for Today!'
ebook package, you qualify for a free book.
Here's more information:
http://www.CrochetForToday.com/judyspecial.htm
Q. 'Are your Video Books strictly for downloading or
will a printed version be available? If so, how would
we see the videos?'
A. There have been so many requests that, YES!, we are
planning on having a printed version with a companion
DVD (for the videos) available for each volume as early
as Thursday! Check the website Thursday morning!
Q. 'I'm a little nervous about using my credit card
online, how do I know it's safe?'
A. We realize many people have never ordered anything
on the Internet before and some of our readers are a
bit nervous about using their credit card online.
We completely understand! That's exactly why we chose
Clickbank as the credit card processor for our
downloadable products.
Here's why your credit card is safe:
http://www.CrochetForToday.com/creditcardsafe.htm
Q. 'I'm concerned about these video books. It is on
the internet, so does that mean your website will
always be available?'
A. Yes, it will be on our server, and available 24 hours
a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year, from virtually
any computer in the world!
Q. 'Will the videos be saved to our computer?'
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 63 --

A. No. Although I've heard it's possible to download
videos to your computer using third party applications,
we do not have technical support for such applications.
Q. 'If 10 years down the road your website is no
longer available, that means the video book will
no longer work, correct?'
A. Correct. The book and all the information would
still be on your computer, but the links to the
videos would be inactive.
But, we're not planning on going out of business anytime
soon! (Even 10 years!) However, if you'd feel better having
a 'hard copy' that you can access anytime, you should be
able to order the printed versions and DVD's for your
convenience. (Check the website Thursday!)
Q. 'Is there any way I can send you my check before
Thursday, April 13 - so that I'm sure to get my copy?'
A. 'Sure! If you cannot get online on the 13th or you
prefer to pay with a U.S. check or U.S. Money order,
here's the order form:
http://www.CrochetForToday.com/crochetchecks3.htm
Once your check clears, you'll be sent an email with
the special download link.
Q. 'Is that Judy in the videos?'
A. Actually, no. (Judy considers herself 'older than dirt'
and '...wouldn't be caught dead on camera!') Most of the
videos feature our dear friend, Patty Bouchamp, The Crochet
Maven. As you've seen, she's one of the most talented
crochet instructors we've ever met!
Q. 'Fantastic work, Jack and Judy! Will your videos
include more detail work for those with some experience?
Your direction and video clips will make it easy to
'take a class at home'! Keep up the great work!'
A. Yes! These two video books have more detailed
information than any other crochet videos we've
ever seen. Everything from perfectly stitched corners
to picking and working with yarn.
Q. 'Where do I go to buy the new Video Books?'
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 63 --

A. At 9:00 AM, Day 89, visit our website:
http://www.CrochetForToday.com
Sorry we haven't been able to give a personal reply to
all the emails like we usually do. Believe it or not, Judy
and I are still putting the finishing touches on everything!
If you've sent in a question or request, hang in there,
and we'll get back to you as soon as we can!
In order to serve as many in our crochet community as
possible, would you let us know how the videos worked
for you?
When you do, please include:
1) Your connection speed (high speed = cable, etc.,
or dial-up modem)
2) Your Computer's operating system (Windows XP,
Mac OS X, etc.)
3) The browser you used when watching the videos
(Internet Explorer, Safari, etc.)
Feel free to post your comments on the blog at
http://www.CrochetForToday.blogspot.com
or just reply to this email.
Your feedback will help us provide the highest
quality online videos that we can.
Finally, THANK YOU! You've all been so helpful!
We really appreciate your feedback.
See you Day 91 morning!
Happy Crocheting!
Jack
